calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JUAN DESOTO'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is Off calendar. The court granted defendant's motion to change venue and ordered this case transferred to Solano County on June 24, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marie Trimble Holvick, Esq., 415.986.5900, for DEFENDANTs WAHEED KHUGIANI, FERRO AUTOMOTIVE GROUP INC. and GENOA AUTOMOTIVE INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WAHEED KHUGIANI, FERRO AUTOMOTIVE GROUP INC., GENOA AUTOMOTIVE INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot in light of the ruling on the motion to transfer venue. In addition, on 6/17/14, Plaintiff filed an amended complaint. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Mtn For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marie Trimble Holvick, Esq., 415.986.5900, for DEFENDANTs WAHEED KHUGIANI, FERRO AUTOMOTIVE GROUP INC. and GENOA AUTOMOTIVE INC.; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS WAHEED KHUGIANI, FERRO AUTOMOTIVE GROUP INC. and GENOA AUTOMOTIVE INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. (CCP 395.5.) Venue is proper in Solano County. Defendants' principal place of business is in Fairfield, California, which is located in Solano County. (Holvick Decl., Exhibits A and B.) The meeting minutes are not dispositive. There is no evidence that the San Francisco address was ever submitted to the Secretary of State as the principal place of business. The address of the agent for service of process is not relevant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Denied
